title: Several Nagasaki Dinghies
popupHtml:
Several Nagasaki Dinghies

Speed boat; dive equipment. Take to sunken plane. Dive down $12,000 cash. Swim to dinghy, save on cell quick save. Load the save. Dive down again for another re-spawned $12,000 cash.

title: Cargo Helicopter
popupHtml:
Cargo Helicopter

Cargo Helicopter if you can manage to survive long enough to steal it, you get 4 stars once you drive through the gate.

title: BF Dune Buggy
popupHtml:
BF Dune Buggy

You can find the dune buggy here.

title: Off-road: Sandking XL
popupHtml:
Off-road: Sandking XL

Located next to the pier, near a boat trailer and some banners.

title: Helicopter
popupHtml:
Helicopter

There is a police Helicopter on the roof sometimes. When entering, you also get a sniper rifle.

title: Emergency: Unmarked Cruiser
popupHtml:
Emergency: Unmarked Cruiser

At night, occasionally Unmarked Cruisers can be seen circling a small loop-around beneath the bridge. The Police Buffalo, Police Bike, and Police Van can also be found here. Note: If there are no vehicles, drive a short distance away and return. Repeat as needed. Also, sometimes up to 4 police officers will be in a vehicle - use caution.

title: Helicopter: Frogger
popupHtml:
Helicopter: Frogger

Occasionally a Frogger will land at the Vespucci Helipads. Sometimes the pilot will exit and walk away, or it will touch down and take off again.

title: Motorcycle: Sanchez
popupHtml:
Motorcycle: Sanchez

You can find 2 Sanchez dirtbikes parked here.

title: Enus Super Diamond
popupHtml:
Enus Super Diamond

The Enus Super Diamond car required for the Epsilon Program mission [Assuming the Truth](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13403) Located in a parking lot behind Leopold's.

title: Dinka Double-T
popupHtml:
Dinka Double-T

The Dinka Double-T motorbike required for the Epsilon Program mission [Assuming the Truth](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13403) Located in one of the parking spaces outside of the LifeInvader offices.

title: Emergency: Police Cruiser

A police cruiser is always parked here. Note: Use caution, as an officer is standing nearby.

title: Super: Truffade Adder
popupHtml:
Super: Truffade Adder

Occasionally parked on the southbound side of Portola Dr. It is arguably the fastest vehicle available, and can be used to sidestep the $1,000,000 price tag that normally accompanies this vehicle. Note: It is likely a homage to the Bugatti Veyron parked outside of House of Bijan in Beverly Hills, California.

title: Emergency: FIB
popupHtml:
Emergency: FIB

At some point, there may be FIB agents here inspecting the radar installation. Along with several agents, there will be two FIB vehicles: FIB Buffalo & FIB Granger. Note: There is not always an FIB Buffalo and FIB Granger; occasionally two of one vehicle may spawn instead. Ironically, these vehicles may be stolen with minimal police intervention.

title: Helicopter: Buzzard Attack Chopper
popupHtml:
Helicopter: Buzzard Attack Chopper

The Buzzard Attack Chopper can spawn here on one of the rooftop helipads. Note: Pay attention to the guards when approaching on foot. If caution is used, the entire base may be infiltrated in a car without raising an alarm. The gates will open if approached.

title: Emergency: Unmarked Cruiser
popupHtml:
Emergency: Unmarked Cruiser

At night, occasionally Unmarked Cruisers may be seen circling a small loop-around beneath the overpass. The Police Buffalo, Police Bike, and Police Van may also be found here. Note: If there are no desired vehicles, drive a short distance away and return. Repeat as needed. Also, up to 4 police officers may be in a vehicle - approach with caution.

title: Hearse
popupHtml:
Hearse

There is a black hearse parked periodically outside a mortuary in this area. The mortuary will have a long blue awning jutting out towards the street. It will be black and parked in the street. If it's not there when you first drive by, keep going up and down the street and it will eventually show up. And it DOES have a casket in the back, and it CAN be modified
